Home / Claude API Cost Calculator

Claude API Cost Calculator

Calculate Claude API costs for Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5, and legacy models. Includes Prompt Caching, batch pricing, growth projections, and cross-provider comparison.

🎭 Scenario Presets
📝 Token Estimator
Estimated: ~<span id="est-tokens">0</span> input tokens (~1.4 w/t EN, ~0.65 c/t CJK)
⚙️ Advanced Options (Caching, Pricing, Growth)
Available: claude-fable-5, claude-opus-4-8, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5, claude-opus-4-1, claude-haiku-3-5, claude-haiku-3

How to Use This Tool

1
Select the Claude models you want to compare (Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Sonnet 4.6, etc.).
2
Enter your average input and output tokens per API call.
3
Choose pricing mode — Real-time for interactive use, Batch for 50% off async processing.
4
Configure Prompt Caching (write tokens, TTL, hit rate) to see potential savings from caching.
5
Set growth rate and projection period for long-term cost planning.
6
Review the cost comparison bar chart, caching breakdown, and cross-provider insights.

Frequently Asked Questions

How does Claude pricing compare to GPT-4o?

Claude Opus 4.8 at $5/$25 per 1M tokens is 2× more expensive than GPT-4o ($2.50/$10) but offers a 1M context window and stronger safety. Claude Haiku 4.5 at $1/$5 is competitive with GPT-4o Mini ($0.15/$0.60). Claude Fable 5 at $10/$50 is Anthropic's most capable model, comparable to o3-level reasoning.

What is Prompt Caching and how much can it save?

Claude's Prompt Caching lets you mark parts of your prompt as cacheable. Cache reads cost 10% of the standard input price (90% discount). Cache writes cost 1.25× (5-min TTL) or 2× (1-hour TTL). A 50K-token system prompt at 500 reqs/day can save ~$24,500/year. Break-even is just 2 cache reads for 5-min TTL.

When should I use Batch API vs Real-time?

Batch API gives 50% off all token costs across all models. Use it for async workloads that can tolerate up to 24-hour processing time — data labeling, bulk analysis, content generation. Real-time is for interactive use cases. You can mix both: batch for large offline jobs, real-time for user-facing requests.

Is Claude Fable 5 worth the premium?

Fable 5 at $10/$50 is 2× Opus 4.8 pricing but delivers Mythos-class performance (~95% on SWE-bench Verified). It's worth it for: frontier coding tasks, multi-day autonomous agent runs, complex research requiring deepest reasoning. For everyday tasks, Opus 4.8 or Sonnet 4.6 offer better value.

How does Claude's tokenizer affect costs?

Claude uses a different tokenizer from OpenAI. For English text, Claude produces roughly 1.3-1.5 tokens/word (vs OpenAI's ~1.3). Opus 4.7 introduced a new tokenizer that can produce up to 35% more tokens for the same text compared to Opus 4.6. Always compare token counts when switching models.

Can I switch between Claude models easily?

Yes, all Claude models share the same Messages API format. Switch by changing the model parameter. Use Haiku for cost-sensitive classification/routing, Sonnet for everyday tasks, Opus for complex analysis, and Fable 5 for frontier coding. Many teams implement model routing based on task complexity.

How do I estimate token counts for Claude?

As a rule of thumb: ~1.4 words/token for English prose, ~0.65 chars/token for CJK text. A typical 500-word English prompt uses ~350-400 tokens. Use the token estimator on this page for quick estimates, or Anthropic's token counting API for precise counts.

request: $0.04 Daily (100): $3.50 Monthly (30d): $105.00 Annual: $1260.00 ———————————————————————————————————————————— 💡 Batch pricing: $0.02/req ($52.50/mo) — save 50% 💰 Savings Insights Haiku 45 saves $94.50/mo ($1134.00/yr) 🌍 Claude Haiku 3 vs GPT-5 Nano: Claude costs $1.88 more/month (250% premium) 🌍 Claude Haiku 3 vs DeepSeek Chat: Claude costs $1.78 more/month (212% premium) 🌍 Claude Haiku 3 vs Gemini 1.5 Flash: Claude costs $1.95 more/month (289% premium) 💡 Premium buys: 1M context, best-in-class safety, superior code generation 📊 Usage Scenarios (monthly cost at 100 reqs/day) ▲ Claude Sonnet 46 (Claude 4.x): 50→$15.75 · 100→$31.50 · 500→$157.50 · 1,000→$315.00 · 5,000→$1575.00 · 10,000→$3150.00 ▲ Claude Haiku 45 (Claude 4.x): 50→$5.25 · 100→$10.50 · 500→$52.50 · 1,000→$105.00 · 5,000→$525.00 · 10,000→$1050.00 ✦ Claude Fable 5 (Mythos): 50→$52.50 · 100→$105.00 · 500→$525.00 · 1,000→$1050.00 · 5,000→$5250.00 · 10,000→$10500.00 🩺 Cost Health: ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── • 🟠 10x cost spread across selected models — review if every model needs to be premium. • 🟢 Low-volume tier — Claude Haiku 45 at $10.50/mo. • ⚠️ Cache hit rate is 0% — enabling prompt caching on repeated prefixes can cut cost 40-90%. • 💡 Cache write multiplier is 1.25x — writes are expensive. Only cache stable prefixes (system prompts, few-shot examples). 🔄 What-If Scenarios: ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── • Switch cheapest to Claude Haiku 3: save $7.88/mo (similar quality, much cheaper) • Double volume to 200 reqs/day: $294.00/mo • Halve volume to 50 reqs/day: $73.50/mo • Boost cache hit rate to 50%: save ~$33.08/mo ($147.00 → $113.92)
